title: Adjective order
description: Put adjectives in the right order, using your new favorite memory aid, DOSA-SCOMP.
topic_path: Adjective order and commas with adjectives

assessment_items.question_content:
**Pick the best adjective order to describe the noun "car".**


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Remember DOSA SCOMP:

Determiner, Opinion, Size, Age, Shape, Color, Origin, Material, Purpose
Following this pattern, the best adjective order is **"the new red car"**.
